---
title: "Poly-Olbion, or, A Chorographicall Description of Tracts, Riuers, Mountaines, Forests, and other parts of this Renowned Isle of Great Britaine"
---

## Poly-Olbion, or, A Chorographicall Description of Tracts, Riuers, Mountaines, Forests, and other parts of this Renowned Isle of Great Britaine

**Author:** Michael Drayton
**Date:** 1613
**Imprint:** London: Lownes

### Notes

A continuation was published in 1622.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
